chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2651 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يَحْتَجِمَ اَلْمُحْرِمُ مَا لَمْ يَحْلِقْ أَوْ يَقْلَعِ اَلشَّعْرَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2651 - Hammad narrated from Hariz, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"There is no harm for a Muhrim to undergo cupping (hijamah), provided he does not shave or pluck hair."
